The trace exhibits several issues, including disobeying task specifications (agents repeating instructions instead of solving the problem), task derailment (agents proposing simplified implementations instead of finding the actual code), information withholding (agents not sharing relevant information), weak verification (reviewers failing to identify critical bugs), step repetition (repeatedly asking to continue without progress), ignoring other agent's suggestions (continuing despite being told the problem is unsolvable), and premature termination (failing a task due to an invalid token). There are also instances of action-reasoning mismatch and loss of conversation history.
